description_long: This is a dark, futuristic military-style airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and aggressive design elements. The wings are sharply swept back and feature prominent weapon mounts or pods, giving it a heavily armed appearance. Twin vertical stabilizers rise from the rear, flanking a set of three large, circular exhaust ports, suggesting powerful jet propulsion. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be heavily armored, with a canopy integrated smoothly into the fuselage. The landing gear is visible and appears to be retractable, with multiple struts extending from the underside. The overall surface is matte and dark, with subtle panel lines and mechanical detailing throughout.
description: A dark, angular, heavily armed military airplane with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward cockpit. Features include prominent weapon mounts and large rear jet exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the angular, weapon-laden wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the swept-back wings, visible landing gear, and the layered, mechanical fuselage details.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals three large circular jet exhausts, twin vertical stabilizers, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same swept wings, landing gear, and detailed fuselage contours.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings, featuring prominent weapon mounts and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Triple rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane arrangement.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage, likely single-seat with a streamlined canopy.
